programme.title: MeatEater - Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaskas Brooks Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - Deer the Hard Way: Prince of Wales Island (Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen)
programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater - Burger Extravaganza Cooking Special
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 1
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. From bowfishing to hunting in the jungle at night, you never know what the evening's menu will bring.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 2
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 3
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America.

programme.title: MeatEater - About Time: Helen and Brittany Hunt Elk in Montana
programme.desc: Brittany and Helen have put more work in on MeatEater than just about anyone else, but have yet to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sky Island Solitaire: Backpack Hunting Coues Deer in Arizona
programme.desc: Steve returns to southern Arizona to stalk the elusive Coues deer. Unaccompanied, Steve immerses himself in the quiet southwest desert and gets intimate with one of the most wary animals in the west. Throughout the hunt, Steve articulates why solo time in trophy country is good for the soul.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ribeye of the Sky: Sandhill Cranes in West Texas
programme.desc: Steve and bird hunting aficionado Ronny Boehme join up with wildlife biologist Ed Arnett in Lubbock, Texas.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice: Steven Rinella has somehow beaten the odds and drawn a second Muskox tag after having to forfeit his first one four years ago due to unforeseen circumstances. Steve has always regretted passing up an opportunity to hunt Muskox but with another tag in his pocket, nothing will stop this adventure. We learn about the native history and culture of Nunivak Island's as Steve tries to stay warm while chasing Muskox 30 miles offshore in the Bering Sea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Gobbling: California Turkeys
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 1
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 2
programme.desc: In Part One, Steve experienced the difficulty of hunting the Sooty grouse of southeast Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild to Table: Memorable Meals Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steve loves to fish as much as he loves to hunt.Steve is on a river in SW Montana for a day to catch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southern Traditions: Virginia Doves
programme.desc: All across America hunters kick off the fall hunting season with a weekend of doves, friends, and food. Steve's lifelong friend, Ronny Boehme has invited Steve out to his digs in Virginia for the dove opener. To prep for opening day, Steve and Ron spend a day brushing up on their shooting skills on a sporting clays course followed by a pigeon hunt. Steve shares simple, delicious cooking methods for doves and pigeons.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Meditation: BC Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Aaron Evans join Steve on an epic adventure in British Columbia's Rockies to pursue grizzly bears. Steve has long desired to take a grizzly but only if he can do it in a way that fits his personal ethics. The hunt is dampened by frustrating weather but Steve finds a way to fix a tasty meal.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lobster of the Prairie: Wyoming Antelope
programme.desc: Steve is fed up with disrespect for one of the world's most unique game animals-the pronghorn antelope.

programme.title: Capítulo 136
programme.desc: Roberta helps Diego ditch school. Alma brings Mia from school to be the new main fashion model. José is threatened with expulsion if she doesn't admit to theft. Diego and Paola plan to run away together. Renata confronts Enrique about his past.

programme.title: Capítulo 137
programme.desc: Roberta asks Paola to tell Diego the truth of her relationship with León. Diego leaves with Paola. Franco tries to pay Alma to stay away from Mia. Alma and Roberta cry for their loves. Gastón tells Mia he has a love he can't get out of his head; he embraces her a second time.

programme.title: Capítulo 138
programme.desc: Alma reveals to Franco, in a big way, how she spent his bribe money. Teo steals all the other teachers wallets and puts them in Pascual's desk in order to save José. Roberta gets Mabel to go look for Diego. Galia, Pascual and Pilar's wife and mother respectively, becomes the new English teacher.

programme.title: Capítulo 139
programme.desc: The Lodge is upset that they failed in getting José expelled. José meets her tutor face to face. Franco finds out that Mia like a man; not a boy at the school. Mia, in anger, tells her father she's in love with Gastón; however Gastón is not worried. Later, when Mia becomes upset at the sight of Viviana with Miguel, Gastón kisses her.

programme.title: Capítulo 140
programme.desc: Gastón kisses Mia for the first time. Franco believes that Alma is cheating on Carlo. Nico tells Teo he might like José more than he knows. Mia tells Gastón she's harassed by Miguel at school. Franco follows the alleged cheater and finds out he's in charge of Mia's model campaign. Raquel and Giovanni begin to date; Tomás and him fight. Teo is saved by a fellow Lodge member. Gastón tells Mia he wants to take care of her for life.

programme.title: Capítulo 141
programme.desc: Teo tells Miguel and Nico that the room guard of the Lodge has a black eye; they look for suspects. Celina becomes depressed because of her break up with Augusto; she binge eats. Roberta and Pepa go to Puebla City. León finds out Diego left school.

programme.title: Capítulo 142
programme.desc: León reveals to Mabel that Paola is a prostitute. Giovanni lies to Raquel about his family, saying they're royalty. José tries to help Celina with the PE test. Mia forgets to do her math homework; Gastón brings it to class completed. Renata makes the students participate in a math competition. Celina gets injured during the test. Mia angers Gastón when she goes to Madariaga for help. León finds Diego with Roberta at the hotel.

programme.title: Capítulo 143
programme.desc: Pilar tries to get Lupita and Tomás together for hidden reasons. Paola rejects Diego after seeing León. Miguel, Nico, and Teo plan to follow Tomás and Giovanni to see which is in the Lodge. Giovanni hires a man to pose as his rich father. León tells Diego that Paola is a whore. Nico and Miguel get ambushed by the suspect. Celina is comforted by Miguel on the subject of image.

programme.title: Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Gastón invites Mia out on a date. Giovanni's fake parents aren't what they seem. Vico follows Celina to find out her secret appointment. Carlo tells Roberta he has a surprise for her. Franco and Valeria come to see if Mia lied about staying at school so she could go out with Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Carlo and Roberta go drag racing. Giovanni tries to ride a horse. Vico realizes the place Celina visited. Nico tries to ruin Lupita's date. León has Diego fight his anger out. Raquel finds out Giovanni lied. Diego give Nico his guitar; Nico sees the matching shoes in Diego, Tomás, Giovanni's room. Roberta and Carlo are arrested; revealing Mia's lie.

programme.title: ¿Qué pasó ayer?
programme.desc: Vítor and Albertano are two decent but very conceited best friends who are going for the same goals: to find good jobs, nice places to live, and true love.

programme.title: La boda imposible
programme.desc: Albertano le confiesa a Lucha que está enamorado de María y quiere casarse con ella. María debe decidir si quedarse con Albertano o iniciar una vida al lado de un nuevo amor.

programme.title: El sueño angélico
programme.desc: María de todos los Ángeles es una tierna chica cansada de dar la prueba de amor por todos lados, no pierde la esperanza de encontrar al hombre de su vida. Una noche por revelación divina, sus ángeles de la guarda le anuncian la llegada de su ser amado, pero tendrá que realizar una serie de peripecias al seguir una las señales para que esto ocurra. Mientras tanto su vecina Doña Lucha con quien no tiene buena relacion y que es madre de El Chino y Rosa Aurora, recibe la llegada de su hijo consentido Albertano quien se había ausentado para probar suerte en Estados Unidos. Albertano decide vivir solo en el cuarto de azotea ya que siente que el viaje lo ha hecho un hombre maduro e independiente, claro mientras que su madre le lave, le planche, le suba el desayuno y le prenda el boiler. María no encuentra las señales, pero en la noche mientras tiende tristemente su ropa en la azotea, descubre a Albertano quien le ayuda caballerosamente a tender sus sabanas, María ve en ello la señal que había estado esperando.

programme.title: La navidad prefecta
programme.desc: Federica spends all the money Ludovico had saved up for Christmas.

programme.title: Recuerdos
programme.desc: Ludovico P. Luche retells the story of how his family came to be, from meeting Federica to acquiring their three children, Bibi, Ludoviquito, and Junior.

programme.title: La pintura del edificio
programme.desc: When German finishes painting the building, a group of Alejandra's friends spray-paint it. Meanwhile, Silvia's parents visit and want to meet her boyfriend, but she has no boyfriend.

programme.title: La vampira bonita
programme.desc: Marco falls in love with Alejandra's friend and tries to win her. Meanwhile, Frankie and Luis have a noisy war because of Lorena's washing machine. Benito has a new role and he needs to cry while recording.

programme.title: Los Héroes Del Caribe
programme.desc: A country music band from a small Mexican town, created by random bizarre members, strives to achieve fame and fortune.

programme.title: Testigo, pero no complice
programme.desc: Monica and Aurelio share a fleeting moment. Aurelio compliments his daughter. Monica joins Tony and Esperanza but wont agree to killing Casillas. Jorge is freed by Colon and Castillo. Aurelio must find the tanker and a new port of call.

programme.title: Traicion o negocios
programme.desc: Ruti warns Carmen of Aureilo. Aurelio visits Tata and encourages her to keep hope. Monica Tony and Esperanza form a new alliance and strategy. Felina is en route to Mexico to buy silver. Isma confronts Pau on Arelys.

programme.title: La depresion de Esperanza
programme.desc: The authorities have located the tanker. Colon Jorge and Castillo are headed there as are Isma Aurelio Ninon and Ray. Felina pays a visit to Dalvio and Tata as does Omar to Ruti. Esperanza gets drunk same goes for Juan Carlos.

programme.title: La Felina no como cuentos
programme.desc: Felina threatens Ninon. Monica leaves Tony in Spain. Colon goes to Europe. Esperanza calls her parents. She also escapes Skinny and the Maras in Kansas City. Aurelio sits down with Felina on staying in business with Ninon.

programme.title: Peligrosa atraccion
programme.desc: Feline and Aurelio toast in honor of Pilar. Monica feels despair. Dalvio confronts Tata's secret. Pau returns home taking note of Carmen. Javi and Ruti awaken together. Jorge calls Ruti looking for Sebas. Feline tracks Pilar's phone.

programme.title: De cara a la prensa
programme.desc: Ruti orders Pompeyo to cover up any relationship with Sebas. Monica asks for Omar's help with Isidro. Eunice finds witnesses. Esperanza has an altercation with a farmer. Ruti agrees to interview with Carla. Grenas finds evidence.

programme.title: Ex amantes que negocian
programme.desc: Aurelio meets with Monica and Feline with Ninon. Jorge goes to Venezuela undercover. Tony is close to finding the shipment. Aurelio agrees with Monica on Isidro. Both Tony and Feline find Ninon's weakness. Esperanza is en route to Chicago.

programme.title: Rastrean a Esperanza
programme.desc: Esperanza calls out Isma. Monica decides not to help Esperanza. Ninon learns of the camera hacking. Ruti cuts the interview. Aurelio is alerted that Interpol is onto the shipment. Dalvio tells Isma of his mothers condition.

programme.title: Mas que un mensajero
programme.desc: Aurelio warns Ruti. Pau is love struck. Arelys loves magazines. Leandro welcomes 30-30. Jorge is captured by Penumbra's men. Grenas locates Pastrana. Casillas fires two grenades Tony's way but he escapes.

programme.title: Torturan a Salazar
programme.desc: Casillas is happy to hear of Penumbra's catch. Monica finds Ruti and Javi together. Raymundo and Leandro meet with Penumbra and Doble 30. Aurelio tortures Salazar. Felina says her goodbyes to Jorge. Monica is worried.

programme.title: Alianza para matar
programme.desc: Monica tells Esperanza of Jorge. Tony meets Esperanza and asks her to partner with him. The Arabs watch Ninon and Leonardo. Wig cautions Isma of Pau's friend Arelys. Felina is weary of Raymundo's ties in Cali. Aurelio returns home.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Sortilegio

Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.
